Release "xa-guard-ha" does not exist. Installing it now.
NAME: xa-guard-ha
LAST DEPLOYED: Thu Jul 16 05:11:54 2026
NAMESPACE: xa-guard
STATUS: deployed
REVISION: 1
TEST SUITE: None
NOTES:
XA-Guard 0.2.0 profile:
  reference external dependencies

Required pre-existing Secrets:
  runtime:      xa-guard-runtime
    keys: database-url, oidc-client-secret, oidc-introspection-client-secret, internal-authorization-key
  business API: xa-guard-business-api
    keys: database-url, api-key
  key provider: xa-guard-key-provider
    key: auth-token
  HTTP key-provider mode does not read or mount a KEK keyring.

The chart does not install PostgreSQL, Keycloak, or a key provider. External
egress is denied until dependency-specific CIDRs are supplied under
networkPolicy.dependencies. Do not use a catch-all 0.0.0.0/0 CIDR.

commands.label: verify api replicas
verify worker replicas
render migration rerun
commands.stdout_tail:
p.kubernetes.io/instance: xa-guard-ha
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "0.2.0"
    app.kubernetes.io/component: migration
    xa-guard.dev/migration-run: "rerun-1784203957"
spec:
  backoffLimit: 3
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 300
  ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 86400
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: xa-guard
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: xa-guard-ha
        app.kubernetes.io/component: migration
        xa-guard.dev/migration-run: "rerun-1784203957"
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      serviceAccountName: xa-guard-ha
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: migration
          image: "xa-guard-reference:0.2.0"
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
              - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          command:
            - python
          args:
            - -m
            - xa_guard.control.migrate
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: xa-guard-ha-config
          env:
            - name: XA_GUARD_DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: xa-guard-runtime
                  key: database-url
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 128Mi
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: config
              mountPath: /etc/xa-guard
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: xa-guard-ha-config
